hero.title: Grow Your Brand in Telegram with AI
hero.description: AI assistant for audience attraction through smart comments. Automate your presence in relevant channels and track engagement growth.

ai_comments.title: Smart AI Comments
ai_comments.description: Automatic participation in discussions on your behalf. AI understands context and generates relevant responses that draw attention to your profile.

scalable.title: Scalable Presence
scalable.description: Manage multiple profiles simultaneously. Automatic rotation to reach more of your target audience without limitations.

protection.title: Reputation Protection
protection.description: Automatic account status monitoring. Instant response to platform restrictions to maintain your presence.

analytics.title: Growth Analytics
analytics.description: Track correlation between activity and reach growth. Visualize the impact of your comments on audience growth in real-time.

targeting.title: Audience Targeting
targeting.description: AI finds channels with your target audience. Automatic focus on communities with maximum growth potential.

automation.title: Reliable Automation
automation.description: Production-ready solution based on official Telegram API. Secure account management with 2FA support.

cta.title: Open Source
cta.description: Puppetgram is an open source platform for Telegram growth. Start attracting audience through smart AI comments today.
